columns.name: KornHandler
columns.description: The handler of corn in the grain settlement

columns.name: Mottakernr
columns.description: Unique identifier for the mottaker in the grain settlement

columns.name: Postnr
columns.description: Postal code of the mottaker's address

columns.name: Poststed
columns.description: Town or city of the mottaker's address

columns.name: Kontonr
columns.description: Account number related to the mottaker

columns.name: Kontaktperson
columns.description: Contact person's name for the mottaker

columns.name: Telefonnr
columns.description: Phone number of the contact person

columns.name: EpostAdresse
columns.description: Email address of the mottaker or contact person

columns.name: Brukerid
columns.description: User identifier related to the mottaker

columns.name: Tidspunkt
columns.description: Timestamp of when this record was created or last updated

columns.name: Levnr
columns.description: Legacy number for reference, possibly related to other tables
